cobblemon.species.monk.name: Monk
cobblemon.species.monk.desc1: In its natural habitat, this pokémon desprately attempts to eat glow berries that hang just out of reach.
cobblemon.species.monk.desc2: It is mostly blind, and must curl its tail to create a paddle. It struggles even in its home territory.
